package rulefixtures

// scenario for goroutine_for_sync_work: `go func() { result <- compute() }()` followed by `<-result` where the goroutine is immediately awaited
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
type Rule599NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario599Negative(records []Rule599NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
